title: C++ Programming Basics: Keywords Overview
desc: A comprehensive list of C++ keywords categorized by usage, from data types to OOP.

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 1: Series Convergence
desc: Analyzes convergence of six series using comparison, ratio, and root tests.

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 10
desc: Surface and line integrals computation with parameterization and orientation.

title: 高等微积分作业：幂级数与函数展开
desc: 分析幂级数收敛域、求和公式及函数项级数性质。

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 3
desc: Metric on continuous functions, Cauchy sequences, Cauchy-Schwarz inequality, open sets.

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 5 Solutions
desc: Partial derivative calculations for various composite functions with chain rule.

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 6 Analysis
desc: Implicit function theorem and Taylor expansion for z(x,y) near (1,1).

title: Advanced Calculus 2 Homework 7 Analysis
desc: Critical points and extremum analysis of two functions with Hessian matrix.

title: 高等微积分作业：换元法求面积与积分
desc: 通过变量替换计算区域面积和多重积分，展示换元公式的应用。

title: 高等微积分作业：曲面面积与质心
desc: 椭球面面积参数化，球面面积计算，上半球面质心求解。

title: 复变函数作业：模恒等与倍角公式
desc: 证明模为1的复数变换恒等式，并推导n倍角三角函数公式。

title: Complex Analysis Homework 10: Residue Theorem
desc: Using residue theorem to compute definite integrals with trigonometric and hyperbolic functions.

title: 复变函数第11次作业：留数定理应用
desc: 利用留数定理计算三个含参数积分，涉及支点与围道积分。

title: 复变函数作业：初等与多值函数
desc: 证明三角与双曲函数的恒等式及不等式，涉及复变函数基本性质。

title: 复变函数第4次作业分析
desc: 计算复积分并确定参数a使函数单值。

title: 复变函数第5次作业分析
desc: 判断正项级数收敛性命题，给出反例与证明。

title: 复变函数第6次作业分析
desc: 确定级数收敛半径，证明和函数不连续，求和函数。

title: Complex Analysis Homework 7: Taylor Series
desc: Taylor expansions of sec z, log((1+z)/(1-z)), and sqrt((1-z)/(1+z)) with convergence radii.

title: 复变函数第8次作业：Laurent展开
desc: 求解三个函数的Laurent展开，包括不同区域和分支。

title: Spring Vibration Problem Analysis
desc: Derives wave equation for a vertical spring with mass and initial conditions.

title: Spherical Harmonic Expansion and PDE Solution
desc: Expand functions in spherical harmonics and solve Laplace equation with source terms.

title: Mathematical Physics Homework 11: Integral Calculation
desc: Compute integral using substitution and Bessel function J2(a).

title: Critical Radius of Uranium Cylinder and Sphere
desc: Derivation of critical radius for cylindrical and spherical uranium blocks using neutron diffusion equation.

title: Dirac Delta Function Identities and Coordinate Representations
desc: Proofs of delta function identities including scaling, product, and Laplacian in 3D.

title: Laplace Transform for Forced Oscillations
desc: Solve forced vibration problem using Laplace transform with partial fractions.

title: Green's Function for 1D Problem
desc: Derives Green's function for ODE with Dirichlet BCs and solves boundary value problem.

title: Math Physics Homework 3: Laplace Equation
desc: Solving Laplace equation with mixed boundary conditions using separation of variables.

title: Solving Heat Equation with Sinusoidal Boundary
desc: Decompose solution, use eigenfunction expansion to solve non-homogeneous heat equation.

title: Math Physics Homework 5: Cylinder Potential
desc: Potential inside a split cylinder with opposite halves at ±V.

title: Math Physics HW6: Series Solutions
desc: Solving ODEs via power series around z=0, deriving recurrence relations and two independent solutions.
